Receipt_May30_2024: Restaurant receipt or order ticket from Central East Asian Cuisine showing purchase of 'Big Plate Whole Chicken' on 2024-05-30; proves plaintiff bought and ate the specific dish at the defendant's premises the day of injury.
CreditCard_Statement_May2024: Bank or credit card transaction record showing payment to the restaurant on 2024-05-30 with timestamp; corroborates receipt and proves presence/transaction at the restaurant.
Photo_BigPlateWithBones_May30: Photographs of the served Big Plate Whole Chicken taken at the table (ideally timestamped or with metadata) clearly showing small bones in the meat; demonstrates dangerous/foreign bone material in the food.
Photo_BrokenTooth_May30: Photograph(s) of the damaged/cracked tooth immediately after the incident (or emergency visit), with metadata; visually documents the injury causally linked to biting bone.
Staff_Apology_Record: Written text, photographed note, or contemporaneous written statement from restaurant staff apologizing after the incident (or plaintiff affidavit describing verbal apology); supports admission of incident and contemporaneous recognition that something went wrong.
Witness_Statement_Tablemate: Signed written statement from any dining companion or nearby patron who observed the plaintiff biting the bone or the immediate aftermath; provides independent eyewitness corroboration of the event and plaintiff's reaction.
Restaurant_IncidentReport_May30: If the restaurant completed an internal incident/accident report, produce that form documenting the date/time, plaintiff details, and staff notes; shows the restaurant acknowledged the event internally.
Surveillance_Video_Request: Request for/description of restaurant CCTV footage covering the table area and time of the incident (2024-05-30); video could show the plaintiff biting the food, reacting, and staff response—strong objective evidence.
Dental_Records_Extraction: Dental charting, clinical notes, operative report, and extraction consent form from the dentist documenting diagnosis, extraction procedure, date(s), and clinical reason (tooth fractured from trauma); links the injury to required treatment.
Dentist_Xrays_BeforeAfter: Radiographs (periapical/panoramic x-rays) taken before extraction and after showing the fractured tooth and post-extraction condition; medical imaging substantiates the nature and severity of the dental injury.
Dental_Implant_Invoice: Itemized invoice and receipt for the dental implant procedure showing the $4500 charge (or detailed estimate and subsequent payment record); proves the cost sought as damages.
Payment_Receipts_Dental: Proof of payment(s) to the dental office (credit card receipt, bank record, or paid receipt) showing amounts actually paid for extraction and implant; evidences out-of-pocket economic loss.
Medical_Emergency_Record_May30: If plaintiff sought urgent care or ER treatment after the pain worsened, produce medical records showing visit, pain complaints, and referral to dentist; supports timeline and severity of pain.
Demand_Letter_May2024: Copy of the demand letter sent to Central East Asian Cuisine and any proof of delivery/receipt; shows pre-suit notice and that defendant had opportunity to resolve before filing.
PainDiary_Affidavit: Short contemporaneous pain diary entries or sworn affidavit describing pain level, impact on daily life, emotional distress, and recovery timeline; supports claim for non-economic damages.
Work_Missed_Record_Paystub: Employer note, time-off request, or paystub showing dates/hours of work missed due to dental visits and recovery; quantifies any lost wages or work impact.
Expert_Dental_Opinion_Report: Brief written opinion from an independent dentist or endodontist connecting the fractured tooth to traumatic biting of hard bone in food and confirming that implant was a reasonable remedial treatment; strengthens causation and reasonableness of damages.
Menu_BigPlateWholeChicken_May2024: Copy or photo of the restaurant menu from around 2024 showing the 'Big Plate Whole Chicken' description (to show dish served and its nature); helps tie the purchased item to restaurant offerings and expectations.
Timeline_Chronology: Concise timeline document (with dates/times) of events from dining (2024-05-30) to extraction and implant, listing contacts with restaurant and medical providers; helps the trier of fact quickly understand sequence and causation.
